class.name: ASEffectModifierData
class.brief_description: Runtime modifier data with custom magnitude support.
class.description:
ASEffectModifierData extends the basic modifier with runtime-specific features including custom magnitude overrides. Used by ASEffectSpec during effect execution to handle dynamic modifier values that may differ from the base definition.
Key features: - Custom magnitude override capability - Runtime attribute modification tracking - Serialization support for state management - Integration with effect stacking and scaling
Used when effects need dynamic modifier values based on context, target properties, or other runtime factors.

method.name: to_dict
method.description: Converts the modifier data to a Dictionary for serialization.

method.name: from_dict
method.description: Loads modifier data from a Dictionary created by to_dict().

members.member: The name of the attribute this modifier affects.
The magnitude value for this modifier (may be custom).
If true, uses the custom magnitude instead of base effect value.
